text: The dim blue glow and reflections make the space feel both futuristic and otherworldly. As I observe the "R+D" wall, I am reminded of the endless potential of research and development, but also the uncertainty that comes with innovation. The isolation and quiet stir a sense of anticipation within me, as if I am standing on the threshold of possibility, yet aware of the solitude that accompanies such liminal spaces. I feel contemplative, almost expectant, acutely aware of the silence that frames my thoughts in this enigmatic environment.
